sections.summary: Collaborated in team-based academic projects with defined responsibilities Presented research and project outcomes during internal evaluations Applied classroom concepts to realworld problem statements ACADEMIC
sections.education: B.Tech 2 Year– Computer Science & Engineering (AIML) Woxsen University, Telangana 2024 – 2028 CGPA: 8.14 , SGPA: 8.41 Smart Hospital Patient Monitoring System Situation: Manual monitoring of patient vital signs was time-consuming and inefficient. Task: Design and develop a real-time IoT-based patient monitoring system with a live dashboard. Action: Simulated sensor data for heart rate, SpO₂, and temperature using Python. Processed and analyzed data using rolling averages and threshold checks. Built an interactive monitoring dashboard using Streamlit. Result: Enabled real-time visualization of patient health data. Improved early detection of abnormal health conditions. Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, IoT, and data visualization. Handwritten Digit Classifier Project Situation: Manual identification of handwritten digits is time-consuming and prone to errors. Task: Design and develop an automated handwritten digit recognition system using machine learning. Action: Preprocessed and trained a machine learning model using the MNIST dataset. Built a GUI application in Python to upload and process handwritten digit images. Implemented prediction logic to classify digits accurately in real time. Result: Enabled fast and accurate handwritten digit recognition. Reduced manual effort and increased prediction reliability. Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, machine learning, and GUI development. Machine Learning Approaches for Predicting Disease- Associated Genetic Variants PROFESSIONAL

projects.title: Handwritten Digit Classifier Project
projects.description: Handwritten Digit Classifier Project Situation: Manual identification of handwritten digits is time-consuming and prone to errors. Task: Design and develop an automated handwritten digit recognition system using machine learning. Action: Preprocessed and trained a machine learning model using the MNIST dataset. Built a GUI application in Python to upload and process handwritten digit images. Implemented prediction logic to classify digits accurately in real time. Result: Enabled fast and accurate handwritten digit recognition. Reduced manual effort and increased prediction reliability. Strengthened practical knowledge of Python, machine learning, and GUI development.

projects.title: Synchronization and Deadlock Management
projects.description: Synchronization and Deadlock Management in Smart Manufacturing Systems Situation: Need to understand and implement synchronization and deadlock concepts through a practical simulation-based project. Task: Design and develop a GUI-based system to simulate machine synchronization and deadlock handling. Action: Designed a graphical user interface Simulated machine execution and shared resource allocation Implemented deadlock detection and recovery logic Result: Successfully demonstrated machine synchronization and deadlock resolution Improved understanding of operating system concepts and GUI- based system design

sections.experience: Aspiring Computer Science Engineering student with experience in Java development, machine learning projects, and academic research. Good foundation in Object-Oriented Programming, data analysis, and problem-solving, with a growing interest in applying AI and computing techniques to real-world and interdisciplinary domains. Situation: Need to apply machine learning concepts through a practical project. Task: Build a working machine learning model to predict disease- associated genetic variants.
